STA 01 Our Mission

Professionalism and integrity, built to last.

Drawing from over 90 years of engineering and surveying experience in the Brazos Valley and surrounding areas, McClure & Browne Engineering/Surveying, Inc. (MBESI) has continued to meet the ever-increasing need for professionalism and integrity for design and development. We pledge to provide the proactive and responsible quality of service that our clients have come to appreciate every day, to everyone MBESI interacts with both professionally and personally. Our company's strong core provides a foundation suitable to build your dreams on, while leveraging our experience and resources to be as flexible and efficient as needed.

The engineers, surveyors and staff at MBESI have experience with a wide assortment of projects in the Bryan/College Station and surrounding areas. Much of this work has been performed for business entities and city municipalities in Bryan, College Station and Huntsville, Texas, or for private investors who are developing property within these communities. As a result, the staff at MBESI has developed close working relationships with officials in Bryan, College Station, Brazos County, Huntsville and TxDOT, as well as all of the major developers and construction firms that operate in the area.

At MBESI, we are committed to providing the highest level of service, as our many valued and long-time clients can attest. We are confident that we possess the tools, trades, integrity and experience needed to see your project through to a successful and profitable completion. MBESI would like to thank you for your interest and encourage you to contact us regarding your next project. We look forward to welcoming you to our fine family of clients.

STA 02 Disciplines

Two disciplines, one set of coordinates.

Complete civil engineering and land surveying under one roof — the combination that lets MBESI carry a project from raw ground to recorded plat without losing a single reference point.

DISCIPLINE 01

Civil Engineering

Land development, site grading and drainage, and street design built to local and TxDOT standards.

Explore civil work →
DISCIPLINE 02

Land Surveying

Topographic, boundary, route, locative and as-built surveys using optical and GPS techniques.

Explore surveying →
STA 03 Civil Engineering

From bare land to a finished, drained, drivable site.

WaterSanitary sewerStorm drainPlatting

3.1 Land Development

Land development projects include extensive water, sewer, street and storm-drain design, all required to meet local drainage and standard requirements and platting procedures.

Bryan / College Station

  • Alexandria Subdivision
  • Shenandoah Subdivision
  • Edelweiss Estates & Gartens
  • Venture
  • Park Hudson Development
  • Miramont Subdivision & Golf Course
  • Westfield Village Subdivision
  • Indian Lakes Subdivision
  • Duck Haven Subdivision
  • Pebble Creek Subdivision Ph. 9

Huntsville Area

  • Timberland Manor
  • The Village at Sam Houston
  • Prairie Oaks Subdivision
  • Timberwilde Subdivision
  • Section 4

3.2 Site Grading & Drainage Plans

These projects require a storm-water retention/detention plan to meet city standards. Every land-development project includes site grading and drainage plans based on the latest available data.

Bryan / College Station

  • City of Bryan Municipal Building
  • Fannin Elementary School
  • Bowen Elementary (Bryan ISD)
  • U.S. Postal Facility, College Station
  • Carter Creek Shopping Center
  • Allen Academy Private School

Huntsville Area

  • The Home Depot
  • Sterling University Brook Apartments

3.3 Street Design

Thoroughfares follow different criteria based on public or private usage. Both require attention to grading and drainage in accordance with city specifications and/or TxDOT specifications.

Bryan / College Station

  • Finfeather Road Improvements
  • Villa Maria Drive Extension
  • Mumford Road Improvements
  • Welsh Avenue Extension
  • Victoria Avenue
  • Rock Prairie Road Extension
  • Pendleton Drive
  • Copperfield Dr. — Park Hudson
  • Shirewood Subdivision
  • Allen Academy Private School

Huntsville Area

  • 10th Street Extension
  • Veteran's Memorial Pkwy Extension
  • Tall Timbers Lane Extension
  • Daisy Lane Extension
STA 04 Land Surveying

The same instruments the world's largest firms trust.

A combination of optical surveying and GPS techniques produces data ready for import, analysis and integration — the datum the entire project is held to.

Total stationGPSPlatsRight-of-way

4.1 Topographic

Accurate information on a site's existing topography sets the datum the entire project is held to. Collected data is imported and a surface file is created for engineers to use in design and calculations.

Typical Sites

  • Commercial projects
  • Private interest
  • School campuses
  • Church sites

Selected Work

  • Municipal buildings
  • Hospital sites
  • Fannin Elementary School
  • Bowen Elementary School
  • El Campo High School

4.2 Land Acquisition

In conjunction with our development work, we routinely provide right-of-way survey for easements or parcels to be acquired by private entities and city & county governments.

4.3 Boundary

Boundary and land-title surveys are often requested by individuals or developers when filing records or conducting research. MBESI routinely files plats with local government agencies for the recording of subdivisions and land.

4.4 Route

  • Finfeather Road improvement
  • 29th Street widening
  • East Side access road
  • University Drive

4.5 Locative

  • Construction staking
  • Commercial development
  • Private improvements
  • Apartment sites

4.6 As-Built

  • Stormwater detention facilities
  • Single-family residential acquisition
  • Large apartment sites
  • Condo conversions
  • Commercial
  • Retail

STA 07 About Us

A merger of two respected Brazos Valley names.

McClure & Browne Engineering/Surveying, Inc. (MBESI) was created on April 1, 2004, by the merger of McClure Engineering Inc. (established 1982 by Mike McClure) with Ash & Browne Engineering, Inc. (established 1998 by Elrey B. Ash, II and Dale Browne, Jr.).

MBESI is owned by Jeff L. Robertson, P.E. and Kevin R. McClure, R.P.L.S., and employs three professional engineers, two graduate engineers and two licensed surveyors, plus an experienced staff of draftsmen and field personnel. We take particular care in our client relationships to provide complete engineering and surveying services in a trustworthy and dependable manner. If you would like us to contact you regarding a project or proposal, please email mbesi@mcclurebrowne.com.
